'''''Taureg''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that carried [[Water/Legends|water]] and left the container [[Psi]] 1 carrying grain in an Imperial supplies depot.

The ''[[Sarsuma]]'' attempted to steal the [[Grain/Legends|grain]] during the food shortage following the evacuation from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. During the food shortage, following the evacuation from Yavin IV, it was destroyed by the turbolasers of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Badi Dea]]'' which arrived shortly after.

==Behind the scenes==
"Taureg" is the name of a North African [[Wikipedia:Tuareg|tribe]] of Bedouins, which also inspired the name of the [[Wikipedia:Volkswagen Touareg|Volkswagen Touareg]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
